subject: massive pale alien Eldrazi creature with tentacles and wing-like appendages descending through a void
description: An enormous pale-bodied alien creature dominates the frame, its elongated torso and limbs caught in a descending or lunging motion. The creature has multiple long tentacle-like appendages, wing-like extensions, and a body structure that defies conventional anatomy — no discernible face or head in the classic sense. Red gashes or marks are visible across its pale form. The background is a cold blue-purple void with branch-like or tentacle-like dark shapes in the periphery. The scale and alien geometry convey cosmic horror.
foreground: massive pale Eldrazi creature with tentacles mid-descent
